results.rendered_html:
kṛntatra (von 1. kart) n.
1〉 parox. Abschnitt, Abschnitzel, Abfall  NIR. 2,22 . [Page2-0405] kṛntatrādeṣāmuparā udāyan  ṚV. 10,27,23 . dhanva ca yatkṛntatraṃ ca kati svittā vi yojanā 86,20 . bṛhataiva tadbṛhatpratyuttabhnuvantyastomakṛntatrāya yadrathaṃtaraṃ syātkṛntatraṃ syāt  AIT. BR. 5,16 . yajñakṛntatrāṇi  ŚAT. BR. 12,2,3,12 , v. l.
— 2〉 proparox. Pflug  Uṇ. 3,108 .
